    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @pytest.mark.regression

            ("Logo",".logo","CrowdHive"),
            ("Title", "h1.auth-page-shell__title", "Log in to your account"),
        ],
    )
    def test_login_page_elements_visible_and_text(login_page_module:LoginPage, name, locator, expected_text):
        allure.dynamic.title(f"Проверка видимости элемента: {name} на странице авторизации")
        login_page_module.wait_for_selector_visible("h1.auth-page-shell__title")
        login_page_module.check_element_visible_by_selector(locator, name)

    def check_element_text_by_selector(self, selector: str, name: str, expected_text: str, index: int = 0):
